decisions.title_en: SpaceX to acquire Cursor maker Anysphere for $60B all-stock
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. SpaceX signed merger agreement June 16 to buy Anysphere/Cursor for $60B all-stock to bolster xAI/Grok coding; largest fresh story of the day.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic sends Frontier Red Team to Washington to lift Fable 5 export ban; jailbreak details public
decisions.reason: Previously published 06-13 (export-control order + global shutdown). New info on 06-15: Anthropic dispatched top safety/research staff to DC; Tom Brown met Lutnick & Cairncross; Frontier Red Team briefed Commerce's CAISI; Amazon's guardrail-bypass warning revealed as the trigger; jailbreak (multi-agent pack hunt extracting exploit + drug-synthesis route) now public.

decisions.title_en: Z.ai/Zhipu GLM-5.2 open-weights beats GPT-5.5 on coding at 1/6 cost, MIT weights on HF
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. 744B-param MoE (40B active), 1M context, MIT weights live on Hugging Face (zai-org/GLM-5.2), edges GPT-5.5 on FrontierSWE/Terminal-Bench at ~1/6 the cost. event_date 06-13 is 4 days old (within 5-day window).

decisions.title_en: ChatGPT crosses 1 billion monthly active users, fastest app ever
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. ChatGPT reached 1B monthly app users (announced 06-12), fastest app in history to the milestone (Google Maps took ~5yr). event_date 06-12 is exactly 5 days (not >5), eligible.

decisions.title_en: Moonshot adds HighSpeed Mode to Kimi K2.7-Code, up to 6x faster throughput
decisions.reason: Previously published 06-12 (K2.7-Code open-sourced). New info on 06-15: HighSpeed Mode delivering up to 6x faster token throughput; but skips independent benchmark submission.

decisions.title_en: NVIDIA and SK hynix announce multiyear AI-memory partnership
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-06-07 is 10 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: NAVER and NVIDIA to build gigawatt-scale AI factories in South Korea
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-06-07 is 10 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: OpenAI discontinues Sora; burned $15M/day vs $2.1M lifetime revenue
decisions.reason: Underlying shutdown event 2026-04-26 far outside the 5-day window; resurfacing in a June roundup does not reset event_date.

decisions.title_en: Unitree unveils GD01 manned transforming mecha at 3.9M yuan
G7 Evian summit concludes; AI on the leaders' agenda
decisions.reason: Already published 06-12 and 06-15. Summit concludes today but no concrete new AI communique/decision facts available yet to distinguish from prior coverage.
Already published 06-11 with full $12B/$41B details. No substantively new information.
